title: Bridge Essay: The neurological implications of metacognition.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-monitoring, metacognitive awareness, prefrontal-parietal insight circuits.

**The neurological implications of metacognition.**. Front Psychol.. PMID: 41815247. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2026.1756611. This review synthesizes current understanding of metacognitive processes across neuroscientific, clinical, and educational domains. Metacognition, defined broadly to encompass knowledge/awareness, and monitoring/regulation of one'scognitive processes spans both neurological and psychological domains.
